Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

    • Method Detail

      • withName

        public Model.ModelBuilder withName​(String name)
        Required. The resource name of the Model.

        Format: `models/{model}` with a `{model}` naming convention of:

        `"{baseModelId}-{version}"`

        Examples:

        - `models/chat-bison-001`

        Returns:
        this.

      • withBaseModelId

        public Model.ModelBuilder withBaseModelId​(String baseModelId)
        Required. The name of the base model, pass this to the generation request.

        Examples:

        - `chat-bison`

        Returns:
        this.

      • withVersion

        public Model.ModelBuilder withVersion​(String version)
        Required. The version number of the model.

        This represents the major version

        Returns:
        this.

      • withDisplayName

        public Model.ModelBuilder withDisplayName​(String displayName)
        The human-readable name of the model. E.g. "Chat Bison".

        The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withDescription

        public Model.ModelBuilder withDescription​(String description)
        A short description of the model.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withInputTokenLimit

        public Model.ModelBuilder withInputTokenLimit​(Integer inputTokenLimit)
        Maximum number of input tokens allowed for this model.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withOutputTokenLimit

        public Model.ModelBuilder withOutputTokenLimit​(Integer outputTokenLimit)
        Maximum number of output tokens available for this model.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withSupportedGenerationMethods

        public Model.ModelBuilder withSupportedGenerationMethods​(List<String> supportedGenerationMethods)
        The model's supported generation methods.

        The method names are defined as Pascal case strings, such as `generateMessage` which correspond to API methods.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTemperature

        public Model.ModelBuilder withTemperature​(Double temperature)
        Controls the randomness of the output.

        Values can range over [0.0,2.0], inclusive. A higher value will produce responses that are more varied, while a value closer to 0.0 will typically result in less surprising responses from the model. This value specifies default to be used by the backend while making the call to the model.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withMaxTemperature

        public Model.ModelBuilder withMaxTemperature​(Double maxTemperature)
        Max value supported by model.

        Values can range over [0.1,2.0]

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTopP

        public Model.ModelBuilder withTopP​(Double topP)
        For Nucleus sampling.

        Nucleus sampling considers the smallest set of tokens whose probability sum is at least topP. This value specifies default to be used by the backend while making the call to the model.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTopK

        public Model.ModelBuilder withTopK​(Integer topK)
        For Top-k sampling.

        Top-k sampling considers the set of topK most probable tokens. This value specifies default to be used by the backend while making the call to the model. If empty, indicates the model doesn't use top-k sampling, and topK isn't allowed as a generation parameter.

        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public Model build()

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
